candidate_definitions.text: Tools for creating, running, and deploying universal Expo and React Native apps

**The modern [local Expo CLI](https://blog.expo.dev/the-new-expo-cli-f4250d8e3421) is included with the `expo` package and does not need to be installed separately. Run it with `npx expo`. Its source code lives in the [`expo/expo`](https://github.com/expo/expo/blob/main/packages…
A toolkit for React, Preact, Inferno & vanilla JS apps, React libraries and other npm modules for the web, with no configuration (until you need it)

nwb was created at a time when JavaScript tooling was in flux, when the capabilities of ES6 were less widely-supported by browsers than they are today, and when versions of Webpack, Babel and other common build tools were out of date almost as soon as you added them to your pack…

✨ Create server-rendered universal JavaScript applications with no configuration
Use Webpack to manage app-like JavaScript modules in Rails

Webpacker has served the Rails community for over five years as a bridge to compiled and bundled JavaScript. This bridge is no longer needed for most people in most situations following [the release of Rails 7](https://rubyonrails.org/2021/12/15/Rails-7-fulfilling-a-vision). We …
:electron: A complete tool for building and publishing Electron applications
🎒 Backpack is a minimalistic build system for Node.js projects.

A bundler for javascript and friends. Packs many modules into a few bundled assets. Code Splitting allows for loading parts of the application on demand. Through "loaders", modules can be CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, Images, JSON, Coffeescript, LESS, ... and your custom stuff.
TypeScript transformer for improving the debugging experience of styled-components
This is a TypeScript transformer that improves development experience of [`styled-components`](https://www.styled-components.com/).
💠 Speed up your Webpack with esbuild ⚡️
> This README is for babel-loader v8/v9/v10 with Babel v7
This repo contains usage examples for [esbuild-loader](https://github.com/privatenumber/esbuild-loader) that demonstrate setup.
Fast Rust-based bundler for the web with a modernized webpack API 🦀

Detect modules with circular dependencies when bundling with webpack.
Simplifies creation of HTML files to serve your webpack bundles
Demonstrates bundling level for browsers using webpack.
Small CLI toolbox for cross-browser WebExtension development
Override create-react-app webpack configs without ejecting
Simple, fast, extensible build tool. Powered by Rspack 🦀
A one-stop build analyzer for Rspack and webpack.
Create JavaScript libraries in a simple and intuitive way.
A whitespace formatter for different query languages
JHipster is a development platform to quickly generate, develop, & deploy modern web applications & microservice architectures.
Analyze bundle stats(bundle size, assets, modules, packages) and compare the results between different builds. Support for webpack, rspack, vite, rolldown and rollup.
Statoscope is a toolkit to analyze and validate webpack bundle
A Foundation for Scalable Cross-Platform Apps
An Rsbuild plugin to customize CSS minification, allowing you to choose between cssnano (JavaScript-based) or Lightning CSS (Rust-based) for high-performance CSS compression.
Storybook is the industry standard workshop for building, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation
Scripts and configurations to compile Electron applications using webpack
Serves a webpack app. Updates the browser on changes. Documentation https://webpack.js.org/configuration/dev-server/.
Module Federation is a concept that allows developers to share code and resources across multiple JavaScript applications
A secure webpack plugin that supports dotenv and other environment variables and only exposes what you choose and use.
Repository for webpack documentation and more!

Generate favicons for your project with caching for blazing fast rebuilds.

The best way to build Electron apps with security in mind.

A current electron app template with the most popular frameworks, designed and built with security in mind. (If you are curious about what makes an electron app secure, please check out [this page](https://github.com/reZach/secure-electron-template/blob/master/docs/secureapps.md…

unplugin for fluent-vue. Adds support for custom blocks in Vue SFC and external ftl files.
🦔 A Webpack plugin to inline your critical CSS and lazy-load the rest.
